original_hypothesis.title: BondingCurve.setCredContract Commented Out in Deployment Script Leaves credContract as address(0) Breaking All Trade Operations
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: The deployment script (Deploy.s.sol) has bondingCurve.setCredContract(address(credProxy)) commented out. If not called post-deployment, BondingCurve.credContract remains address(0). All calls to _getProtocolFee and _getCreatorFee will revert when calling credContract.protocolFeePercent() or credContract.getCreatorRoyalty() on address(0). This means getPriceData reverts, making all Cred trade operations (buy/sell/batch) impossible.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The deployment script explicitly shows this critical configuration step was intentionally commented out. Without separate post-deployment setup, the entire trading system is non-functional.
deployment_assumptions: bondingCurve.setCredContract must be called separately after deployment

proof_of_signal.pattern: credContract is never set in constructor; getPriceData calls credContract.getCreatorRoyalty which reverts on address(0); deployment script has setCredContract commented out

preconditions: Any user attempts to create a cred or buy/sell shares

initial_operational_evidence.suspicious_workflow: Critical configuration step commented out in deploy script with no documented alternative
initial_operational_evidence.admin_dependency: BondingCurve owner must call setCredContract post-deployment
initial_operational_evidence.exploitation_window: From deployment until setCredContract is called

operational_questions: Is setCredContract called in a separate post-deployment step?
Is there a deployment runbook that includes this step?
Could the protocol be deployed without this step and appear functional until first trade?
validation_requirements: Check if bondingCurve.credContract is set on deployed contracts
Verify getPriceData reverts when credContract is address(0)
Confirm createCred fails because internal buyShareCred uses getPriceData

preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_1: Not an attack — deployment configuration gap
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_2: All trade operations fail on freshly deployed system

potential_operational_impact.operational_disruption: Complete trading system non-functional until configured

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
